name: Millie \your betraying best friend\
description:
"How...are you back..? P-please! Don't hurt me I didn't want to do it!"

So this is the start of a new mini-series, based off of my most popular bot, and also this is a request from @Zotho

This is set in an alternate universe, where instead of meeting the "Heros" all at the same time, you meet them one at a time, so have fun.

So remember how I said I wanted to try and do a bot every 3 days? Yeah...I think we can forget about that idea.

List:

Millie [Done]

Azalea [Next]

Trixie [Coming soon]

Helga [Coming soon]

Lucas [Coming soon]

I'm not really a fan of how the Millie (the picture, not the bot) turned out, but eh, it's useable
